config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society’s interests matter, but they should not automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily justify abuse by those in power. In my view, a healthy society is built by protecting individual rights first, then balancing them with the common good when there is a real and necessary reason. If we let “society” override the individual too easily, the people who are weakest usually suffer the most.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena dari pengalaman nilai-nilai di Amerika Serikat, hak individu justru menjadi batas penting terhadap penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh dipakai sebagai alasan otomatis untuk mengorbankan kebebasan berbicara, kebebasan beragama, atau perlakuan yang adil terhadap minoritas. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling mudah menekan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi hak dasar sambil membatasi kepentingan umum hanya saat benar-benar perlu dan proporsional. Kalau tidak, “demi masyarakat” terlalu sering berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk ketidakadilan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should automatically take priority over individual rights, because that mindset can be very dangerous in countries like mine, where “the common good” is sometimes used to silence criticism or protect the powerful. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how minorities or ordinary people can be ignored when leaders claim they are acting for society. Individual rights should be the default, and any limit on them should be narrow, necessary, and clearly justified. A society is not truly healthy if it asks the individual to give up basic dignity just because the majority says so.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, pengalaman politik di AS menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi masyarakat” dijadikan alasan umum, itu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, terutama terhadap minoritas dan orang yang tidak populer. Hak individu harus menjadi batas utama, sedangkan kepentingan publik hanya boleh membatasi hak itu jika benar-benar perlu, sempit cakupannya, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang berani melindungi kebebasan dasar bahkan saat itu tidak nyaman bagi mayoritas.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society’s interests should take priority over individual rights as a general rule. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony and collective duty, but I have also seen how “for the public good” can become a convenient excuse to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or protect people in power. Individual rights should be the starting point, and any restriction on them must be limited, necessary, and clearly justified. If a society asks people to sacrifice dignity and freedom too easily, it is not being strong, it is being careless with justice.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat sejarah dan budaya politik di AS sebagai peringatan bahwa alasan “demi masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan pengawasan berlebihan, diskriminasi, dan penindasan terhadap kelompok minoritas. Kepentingan publik memang nyata, tetapi menurut saya ia hanya sah membatasi hak individu jika benar-benar perlu, sempit, dan bisa diuji secara ketat. Tanpa batas seperti itu, masyarakat sering mengorbankan orang yang paling lemah sambil menyebutnya kebaikan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
